mnemonics: Module 5 DRIVES Data Structures - (Documentation, Repositories, Interactive, Videos, Examples, Sandboxes)
keyPoints: Official documentation is the most authoritative source for learning a new data structure.
Interactive visualizations and sandbox environments help build intuition through hands-on practice.
A mix of resource types (text, video, code) caters to different learning styles and reinforces understanding.
commonMistakes: Relying on a single resource type instead of using a blended learning approach.
Getting stuck on advanced implementation details before grasping the core concept and purpose of a data structure.
Using outdated tutorials or resources that don't reflect current best practices or language syntax.
